text: Energy certificate PDF download in the dashboard originally required renderedDocument.imageDataUrl to be pre-stored in the project. Projects completed before rendering was introduced (or where rendering was skipped) had no download option at all. Fix: buildEnergyCertificatePdfFactory now falls back to renderEnergyCertificateOverlay(project.formData) on-the-fly when no stored image exists. SignedDocumentsSection now shows the EC card for any status='completed' project, not only when asset is present.
issue: No download button for energy certificate PDF in dashboard for projects with completed EC but missing renderedDocument.imageDataUrl
